description_long: This is a large, freestanding barbecue grill with a sleek, modern design, featuring a double-lidded cooking area and a wide rectangular body. The front side is equipped with multiple control knobs, two large drawers or cabinets for storage, and metallic handles on each lid. Both sides of the grill extend outward with spacious side shelves, providing ample workspace for food preparation or utensil placement. The grill is supported by four small wheels, allowing for mobility, and the main structure appears to be constructed from stainless steel with a dark, powder-coated finish. The lids have built-in thermometers, and the overall build suggests a high-capacity, multi-burner gas grill suitable for group gatherings or urban park installations. The back and sides are solid, with ventilation slots visible at the base.
description: A large, double-lidded stainless steel barbecue grill with multiple burners, side shelves, and storage drawers, finished in dark metallic tones. It features control knobs, built-in thermometers, and four wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual lids, control knobs, storage drawers, and both side shelves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the grill, side shelf, and the profile of the lids and handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel, both side shelves, and the full width of the grill.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite side shelf, the depth of the grill, and the profile of the lids and handles.
